title: Hawk-bat (disambiguation)
content:
'''Hawk-bat''' can mean:
*The [[hawk-bat]], an avian predator native to [[Coruscant]]
**The [[Hawk-bat/Legends|hawk-bat]], the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] version of the above
**[[Hawk-bat egg]]s, their eggs
*The [[Hawk-bat Independent Space Force]], a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] gang that was a front operation for [[Wraith Squadron]]
**[[Hawk-bat Leader]]
**[[Hawk-bat One]]
**[[Hawk-bat Five]]
**[[Hawk-bat Seven]]
**[[Hawk-bat Ten]]
**[[Hawk-bat Twelve]]
*[[Hawk-bat Base]], the asteroid base used by Wraith Squadron in their Hawk-bat pirate guise
*[[Lightsaber/Legends|Lightsaber]] [[Form IV/Legends|Form IV: Ataru]], also known as the "Way of the Hawk-Bat"
*The [[Hawkbat (starship)|''Hawkbat'']], part of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s fleet
**The ''[[Hawkbat's Perch]]'' and
**The ''[[Hawkbat's Vigil]]'', shuttles stationed with the ''Hawkbat''
*[[Hawkbat Battalion]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]
*The [[Hawk-Bat Clan]] of [[Jedi Initiate]]s
**The [[Soaring Hawkbat Clan]], the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] version of the above
*The [[Hawkbat Gang]] swoop racing group
*The [[Hawk-Bat (gunship)|''Hawk-Bat'']], [[Arwen Cohl]]'s [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]]
*[[Jai Maruk]], the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] also known as "the Hawk-bat"
{{Disambig}}

|de=Flederfalken
